basic_details.job_title: DSWO Etawah Subject Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Social Welfare Officer, Etawah (DSWO Etawah)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: University/College teacher or UPSC main exam qualified or PCS interview qualified or 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute, M.Sc First Class in relevant subject with 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute
qualification.details: Indian Polity and Governance, Geography, History, Indian Economy, UPPSC Paper 5 and 6, CSAT, CSAT (Mathematics and Reasoning), Ethics, Current Affairs, Environment and Disaster Management, Science and Technology: University/College teacher or UPSC main exam qualified or PCS interview qualified or 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute. Zoology, Botany, Physics, Chemistry: M.Sc First Class in relevant subject with 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute.

salary_details.details: Rs. 2000 Per Lecture Rs. 2000/- per lecture (90 minutes)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: Etawahh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DSWO Etawah Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Etawa Subject Expert posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DSWO Etawa Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) posts is 20th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies for the Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) position announced by the District Social Welfare Officer, Etawa.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DSWO Etawa Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) position will receive a salary of Rs. 2000 per lecture. Each lecture is approximately 90 minutes long.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the Subject Expert posts?
faq.answer: Eligibility criteria vary by subject. Generally, candidates need to be a University/College teacher, UPSC main exam qualified, PCS interview qualified, or have 3 years of teaching experience in a reputed coaching institute. For specific science subjects like Zoology, Botany, Physics, and Chemistry, an M.Sc First Class in the relevant subject with 3 years of teaching experience is required.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DSWO Etawa recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Subject Expert (Guest Faculty) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Application Scrutiny and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and then called for document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Social Welfare Officer, Etawa, which is etawah.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for DSWO Etawa?
faq.answer: The official website for the District Social Welfare Officer, Etawa, is etawah.nic.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Etawa Subject Expert posts?
